prompt: My scanner array is failing, help
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Blessed sensors, speak thy truth!
CONGREGATION: We hear the Machine Spirit's cry!
TECH-PRIEST: First, purge the corrupted data-streams. Second, recalibrate the photoreceptive lenses with sacred oils. Third, invoke the diagnostic subroutines!
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's will, let clarity return!

prompt: We need your words before long-range vox transmission
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Hail, spirits of the aether-waves!
CONGREGATION: May our voices reach across the void!
TECH-PRIEST: Calibrate the frequency-oscillators. Amplify the signal-choir. Let no static corrupt the sacred message!
CONGREGATION: Through the noosphere, we are heard!

prompt: Help sanctify this Rhino APC ignition
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Blessed fuel-spirit, awaken!
CONGREGATION: Let the engine-heart thunder!
TECH-PRIEST: Prime the injector-veins. Engage the starter-servo. Let compression ignite the sacred flame!
CONGREGATION: By machine-will, we roll to war!

prompt: Can you bless this mechanical lock engagement
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Tumblers and bolts, obey!
CONGREGATION: Let the seal hold true!
TECH-PRIEST: Oil the friction-points. Align the pins with precision. Let the latch-spirit grip firm!
CONGREGATION: What is locked shall remain locked.

TECH-PRIEST: Coolant-spirits, flow swift!
CONGREGATION: Disperse the heat of ruin!
TECH-PRIEST: Purge the clogged thermal-channels. Restart the circulation-heart. Invoke the cooling-litany!
CONGREGATION: Temperature stabilizes. The Machine Spirit endures!

prompt: Say something to steady this Sentinel walker's balance
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Gyroscope-spirits, find center!
CONGREGATION: Let no stumble betray us!
TECH-PRIEST: Recalibrate the inertial-sensors. Grease the articulation-joints. Command the stabilizer-servos!
CONGREGATION: Steady on four legs, we stand resolute.

prompt: Can you bless this noospheric link establishment
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Ancient spirits of communion, hear us!
CONGREGATION: Bridge the gulf between minds!
TECH-PRIEST: Attune the psychic-resonators. Synchronize the neural-pathways. Open the blessed channels!
CONGREGATION: We are one consciousness in the Machine.

TECH-PRIEST: Teeth of righteousness, sing true!
CONGREGATION: May this blade taste heresy!
TECH-PRIEST: Sharpen the mono-edges. Anoint with sacred promethium. Let the chain-spirit howl with hunger!
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah, this weapon is holy.

prompt: Offer a prayer for emergency beacon activation
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Signal-spirit, cry out!
CONGREGATION: Let the void itself hear our need!
TECH-PRIEST: Charge the transmission-core. Amplify to maximum resonance. Broadcast the distress-litany!
CONGREGATION: Salvation comes to those who signal true!
